OneTenth is the billable hours tracker built for legal professionals — log time in 6-minute increments, track your pace against targets, and stay confident in your hours.

Features

Everything a billing lawyer
actually needs.

01
6-minute increments
Log time in 0.1h increments — the standard unit for legal billing. Fast entry, accurate records.
02
Daily pace tracking
Know exactly where you stand against your targets every day. Adjusted daily targets account for holidays, leave, and remaining workdays.
03
Monthly overview
A clean day-by-day breakdown of billable and non-billable hours, variance tracking, and cumulative progress.
04
Statutory holidays
Automatic holiday calendars for all Canadian provinces and US states. Working day calculations are always accurate.
05
Leave management
Add single days or date ranges for vacation and leave. Targets automatically adjust to reflect your actual availability.
06
Export and import
Export all entries to CSV for reporting or archiving. Import past entries from a spreadsheet to get started mid-year.

Privacy

Designed for confidentiality.

OneTenth tracks only hours and billing status — no client names, matter descriptions, or identifying information are ever recorded. Your billing data is anonymized by design.

No accounts. No servers. No analytics. Everything stays on your device, always.

Read the full Privacy Policy →
✓
No accounts or sign-up required
✓
No data collection or analytics
✓
No client or matter information recorded
✓
On-device storage only — no iCloud sync
✓
No third-party integrations or data brokers
Built for practice

The tool your docketing system was never meant to be.

Docketing software tracks matters and tasks. OneTenth tracks you — giving you a personal, private picture of your billing pace that complements whatever your firm uses.

Designed around legal billing conventions
0.1h increments, configurable annual targets, and province- and state-aware holiday calendars — built for how lawyers actually bill.
Client confidentiality by default
OneTenth is structurally incapable of recording client or matter information. Confidentiality isn't a setting — it's the architecture.
Works alongside Clio, PCLaw, and others
Use OneTenth as your personal accountability layer on top of whatever your firm already uses.

Start tracking today.

No subscription. No account needed. Open the app and start logging your hours.
